reasoning: The control SC-7(2) focuses on boundary protection and public access restrictions. In Kubernetes, similar protections can be enforced using NetworkPolicies to restrict ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that no traffic is allowed by default unless explicitly permitted. Additionally, services exposed via LoadBalancer should be restricted to specific IP ranges to prevent unrestricted public access. Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to secure traffic.
title: Boundary Protection - Boundary protection | public access [withdrawn
